name: search_news
description: Searches for recent news articles matching a query with optional filters for language and date range.

query.description: Keywords or a phrase to search for in news headlines and content.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code to filter results, e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'. Defaults to 'en'.

max_results.description: Maximum number of articles to return (1–20). Defaults to 5.

from_date.description: Start date for filtering articles (inclusive), in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_date.description: End date for filtering articles (inclusive), in YYYY-MM-DD format.
